title: peliosanthes teta subsp. humilis
intro: Peliosanthes teta subsp. humilis, also known as the dwarf peliosanthe, is a plant species that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Peliosanthes teta subsp. humilis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
